subcodes.first_line: O scion of that illustrious personage and blessed offspring of that glorious father, this was indeed a supreme calamity and grievous affliction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل آن شخص جلیل و نجل سعید آن پدر مجید این مصیبت کبری رزیه عظمی بود و سبب
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @firmness in the Covenant
